scenes.narration: Two thousand years ago, in a tiny town called Bethlehem, something happened that changed the world forever.
scenes.image_prompt: Nighttime view of the small town of Bethlehem on a hillside, a brilliant glowing star above it, peaceful and beautiful, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: A young woman named Mary received a visitor — an angel named Gabriel. The message he brought was unlike anything ever heard.
scenes.image_prompt: Angel Gabriel glowing with warm golden light appearing before a surprised but peaceful Mary, colorful bright bible storybook illustration, gentle and reverent

scenes.narration: Mary, you are going to have a baby. His name will be Jesus. He will be the Son of God.
scenes.image_prompt: Mary kneeling in awe before the glowing angel, hands clasped, soft smile on her face, warm golden light filling the room, colorful reverent bible illustration

scenes.narration: Mary and Joseph traveled a long road to Bethlehem. When they arrived, every inn was full.
scenes.image_prompt: Mary riding a donkey with Joseph walking beside her on a dusty road at night, a bright star ahead, weary but hopeful, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: A kind innkeeper offered them his stable. It wasn't a palace. Just hay, animals, and a manger.
scenes.image_prompt: A warm glowing stable at night, cows and donkeys resting peacefully, hay on the ground, soft lantern light, colorful cozy bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: That night, Jesus was born. The King of Kings — born in a stable. Wrapped in cloth. Laid in a manger.
scenes.image_prompt: Baby Jesus glowing with warm golden light in a manger of hay, Mary and Joseph kneeling beside him with love, animals watching gently, colorful beautiful bible illustration

scenes.narration: In the fields nearby, shepherds were watching their sheep when suddenly the sky exploded with light.
scenes.image_prompt: Shepherds in a field at night, startled by a brilliant burst of light from above, sheep scattering, angels appearing in the glowing sky, dramatic colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: Don't be afraid, the angel said. I bring you good news of great joy — for all people. The Savior is born.
scenes.image_prompt: A single bright angel speaking to the shepherds, hands outstretched, warm golden light, joy spreading across the shepherds' faces, colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: The shepherds ran to find the baby. And everything was exactly as the angel had said.
scenes.image_prompt: Shepherds hurrying joyfully through the night toward Bethlehem, bright star guiding them, excitement on their faces, colorful cheerful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God didn't send a king in armor. He sent a baby. Because love always starts small... and changes everything.
scenes.image_prompt: Mary holding baby Jesus up toward the glowing star above, Joseph beside her, shepherds kneeling around them, a sky full of stars, peaceful and beautiful colorful bible art
